title: CBIC Grants Power to Extend Re-Export Period for Duty-Free Event Imports
content:
# CBIC Grants Power to Extend Re-Export Period for Duty-Free Event Imports

Ek important update hai. Government ne duty-free imports for events ke re-export period ko extend karne ke liye Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ko empower kiya hai.

*   **What's New:** CBIC (Board) ke paas ab power hai ki woh duty-free import kiye gaye goods ke liye two-year re-export period ko, sufficient cause dikhane par, further extend kar sake.
*   **Background:** Previously, goods imported duty-free for display or use at specified events had a maximum re-export period of two years.
*   **Impact:** This amendment provides flexibility to businesses and event organizers who might face genuine challenges in re-exporting goods within the original two-year timeframe.
*   **Notification Details:** Yeh change Notification No. 28/2026-Customs, dated July 10, 2026, ke through kiya gaya hai, jo Notification No. 8/2016-Customs ko amend karta hai.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/)

*Published on: 12 July 2026*
